case_title: FANYA E. YOUNG VS. MATHEW B. WEBER

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, FANYA E. AS TO DEFENDANT WEBER, MATHEW B. AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA LAW OFFICES OF MATHEW B. WEBER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
